eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 10:40 PM ON MAR 18, 2026 Effective until 06:40 AM MAR 19, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Lake Havasu City Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Lake Havasu PD is looking for Fifty-five-year-old John Spearing. He was last seen near Kearsage Drive and Pecos Drive on 03/18/26 at 6:40 a.m. John is 6'1" tall, 260 lbs with gray hair, brown eyes, wearing a black polo shirt, white tennis shoes and a black and red hat. He was last seen driving a burgundy colored 2005 Chevrolet Corvette, Arizona license plate KYK8288. John has been diagnosed with numerous medical conditions and is dependent on his medications, which he left behind. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
